mapper.sql: (SELECT s.* FROM fund_score s INNER JOIN ( SELECT fund_id, MAX(score_date) AS max_date FROM fund_score GROUP BY fund_id ) m ON m.fund_id = s.fund_id AND m.max_date = s.score_date)
mapper.select: SELECT m.manager_id, m.manager_name, m.company_id, c.company_name, m.start_work_date, m.experience_years, m.manage_scale, m.current_fund_count, m.profile, m.updated_time, COUNT(DISTINCT r.fund_id) AS imported_fund_count FROM fund_manager m LEFT JOIN fund_company c ON c.company_id = m.company_id LEFT JOIN fund_manager_relation r ON r.manager_id = m.manager_id AND r.is_current = 1 WHERE m.manager_id = #{managerId} GROUP BY m.manager_id, m.manager_name, m.company_id, c.company_name, m.start_work_date, m.experience_years, m.manage_scale, m.current_fund_count, m.profile, m.updated_time

SELECT f.fund_id, f.fund_code, f.fund_name, f.fund_type, f.risk_level, f.company_id, c.company_name, f.fund_scale, f.establish_date, s.total_score, s.recommend_level FROM fund_manager_relation r INNER JOIN fund_info f ON f.fund_id = r.fund_id LEFT JOIN fund_company c ON c.company_id = f.company_id LEFT JOIN s ON s.fund_id = f.fund_id WHERE r.manager_id = #{managerId} AND r.is_current = 1 ORDER BY s.total_score DESC NULLS LAST, f.fund_id DESC
